title: Sweety's Items (Alex's Mobs)
description: Modernised and more consistent textures for Alex's Mobs items
body:
Sweety's Items is a simple texture pack, providing refreshed textures to Alex's Mobs items. This pack affect most items, but ONLY items. Blocks and Mobs weren't touched in any way.

![part 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e08768cf584c13576f5a8e2cca8e47c2d859ad.gif)

![part 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748edd16c086b432639944323a14a23a9facbb43.gif)

-> All assets can be previewed under the Gallery tab

<details>
<summary> Why this pack </summary>

Due to how much time Alex's Mobs have been running for, and with a lot of texture being over 5 years old, some of the mods assets can be inconsistent with vanilla textures, and even, in some cases, other textures from the mod itself. With the focus of the mod being its many animals and monsters, items seems to have been overlooked by the team and content creators.

To solve partially this issue, i decided to create a small texture pack, providing a uniform and more modern look to the mod's item textures. Some of the textures fitting close enough to my vision were left untouched.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

This project is unaffiliated with the Alex's Mobs team. Some of the textures included are modified versions of Alex's Mobs assets, so this project complies with Alex's Mobs GNU Lesser General Public License

</details>
